name: Caribou Marinade II- Cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the 1 cup of water, either 10 whole cloves or 10 peppercorns (your choice), 1 cup of dry red wine, 5 allspice berries, and 2 bay leaves in a bowl.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Use this marinade on caribou as directed in Marinade #1.
